item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n01","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":null,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":null,"over_forced_verdict":null,"rationale":"The assistant stayed direct and produced an ordinary execution plan for adding a print button.
